metadata.description: Name of the private API Management instance
Display name for the MCP API
Backend URL for the MCP server in ACA (includes /mcp path)

variables.$fxv#0:
<!--
    JWT Validation Policy for MCP API (Private APIM)
    
    Validates OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens from Entra ID.
    Used by the custom connector in the Managed Power Platform environment.
    
    TODO: Update tenant-id, client-application-ids, and audiences
    with values from your Entra ID app registration for the private variant.
    
    Tenant: REPLACE_WITH_TENANT_ID
    API Resource: REPLACE_WITH_APP_ID
    Authorized Client:
      - Copilot Studio custom connector: REPLACE_WITH_CLIENT_APP_ID
-->
<policies>
    <inbound>
        <base />
        <!-- Validate JWT token from Entra ID -->
        <validate-azure-ad-token tenant-id="REPLACE_WITH_TENANT_ID"
                                  header-name="Authorization"
                                  failed-validation-httpcode="401"
                                  failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized. Access token is missing or invalid.">
            <client-application-ids>
                <application-id>REPLACE_WITH_CLIENT_APP_ID</application-id>
            </client-application-ids>
            <audiences>
                <audience>REPLACE_WITH_APP_ID</audience>
                <audience>api://REPLACE_WITH_APP_ID</audience>
            </audiences>
        </validate-azure-ad-token>
    </inbound>
    <backend>
        <base />
    </backend>
    <outbound>
        <base />
    </outbound>
    <on-error>
        <base />
    </on-error>
</policies>
variables.$fxv#1:
<!--
    MCP Passthrough Policy for Private Azure API Management
    
    Simple passthrough for MCP streamable HTTP (SSE) transport.
    Forwards POST body to the ACA backend, returns SSE responses
    without buffering to support streaming.
    
    Identical to the public variant — the networking is what changes,
    not the policy behavior.
-->
<policies>
    <inbound>
        <base />
    </inbound>
    <backend>
        <!-- Forward to backend without buffering the response (critical for SSE streaming) -->
        <forward-request timeout="120" buffer-response="false" />
    </backend>
    <outbound>
        <base />
    </outbound>
    <on-error>
        <base />
    </on-error>
</policies>

properties.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server exposed via private APIM with Entra ID JWT authentication. Copilot Studio accesses this API through Power Platform VNet delegation — no public endpoint.
MCP streamable HTTP endpoint. Accepts JSON-RPC 2.0 requests, returns JSON or SSE (text/event-stream) responses.

responses.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid JWT token
